Controlled result import

{{ session.name }}

Dry run validates candidate and subject registrations before any official external result is written. Internal `ExamScore` records are never changed.

CSV columns

Required: candidate_number, subject_code. Optional: score, percentage, grade, result_status, source_reference.

Valid result statuses: PENDING, PASS, FAIL, ABSENT, WITHHELD, EXEMPT.
